title: Vance arrives in Switzerland for talks with Iranian negotiators amid rising Strait of Hormuz tensions
summary_full: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
summary_public: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
